title: Villager Language - Extension
description: Replaces the wandering trader’s sounds with English phrases
body:
**This resource pack is an extension of my other resource pack, "Villager Language." It modifies the wandering trader so that, from now on, the wandering villager speaks recognizable English phrases.**

[View "Villager Language" Page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/villager-language)
